decks.notes: This aggro deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence with creatures like Territorial Kavu and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer. It also utilizes powerful spells like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial to control the board and protect its creatures. The inclusion of Leyline binding and Leyline of the Guildpact helps to disrupt opponents' strategies, while cards like Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional threats and pressure. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently, ending the game before they have a chance to recover.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and removal, while also utilizing card advantage and library manipulation to stay ahead in the long game. By consistently controlling the board and limiting the opponent's resources, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opposition to secure victory. The deck utilizes a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to ensure it can handle a variety of threats and maintain control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Allosaurus Combo by utilizing cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to find and cheat out Allosaurus Rider. Once Allosaurus Rider is on the battlefield, the deck can use various cards to either generate massive amounts of mana or find additional combo pieces, ultimately leading to a quick and explosive win condition. The deck also includes cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect the combo and disrupt opponent's strategies, making it a powerful and resilient deck in the Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Psychic Frog to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ulamog, the Defiler from the graveyard. It also utilizes instant spells like Ephemerate and Prismatic Ending for control and protection. Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Fallaji Archaeologist provide additional support and value. The deck aims to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game while disrupting their strategy with targeted removal and hand disruption.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of creature cards to quickly assemble powerful combinations and overwhelm the opponent with a versatile toolbox of options. By utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Leyline of Abundance, the deck can quickly ramp up its mana production and access its key creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ashaya, Soul of the Wild. Quirion Ranger and Lotus Cobra provide additional utility and synergy within the deck, while cards like Springheart Nantuko and Tyvar, Jubilant Brawler offer additional combat abilities and support. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently assemble its pieces and present a formidable threat through creature-centric combos.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast mana generation and card draw to cast powerful spells like Grapeshot and Ral, Monsoon Mage to deal massive damage to the opponent in a single turn. The key strategy is to chain together spells using cards like Ruby Medallion and Past in Flames, while also utilizing Wish to search for key combo pieces. Additionally, the deck includes tools like Strike It Rich and Reckless Impulse to dig deeper into the deck and find the necessary pieces for the combo.

The deck focuses on using fast mana-generating spells such as Desperate Ritual, Pyretic Ritual, and Manamorphose to quickly build up mana and cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot. The goal is to efficiently combo off using cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage's ultimate ability and Past in Flames to recur key spells. The inclusion of Wish cards allows for versatility and potentially game-winning plays. The deck is designed to be explosive and overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells and combo interactions.

This deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower) to generate a large amount of mana and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Kozilek, Butcher of Truth. The deck also includes control elements such as Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while maintaining control of the game through powerful spells and abilities.

The main focus of this deck is to efficiently generate mana using rituals and mana dorks such as Ruby Medallion to cast powerful red spells like Desperate Ritual and Glimpse the Impossible. Ral, Monsoon Mage and Wrenn's Resolve provide additional card advantage and control, while Past in Flames allows for crucial spell recursion. The deck aims to set up explosive turns to combo off and win the game quickly. It also includes some land-focused cards like Valakut Awakening and Thundering Falls to ensure consistency in drawing the right spells.

The deck focuses on using mana ramp and land fetching to quickly assemble the combo of Amulet of Vigor and Primeval Titan to generate significant value and win conditions. It includes cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith to further accelerate the combo, as well as utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Mirrorpool to provide additional options and protection. The goal is to efficiently ramp up to a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with massive threats and synergies.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to establish early board control with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off the opponent. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional threats and resilience. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm, making it a versatile and aggressive deck in the Modern format.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, supported by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also includes cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to provide additional threats and pressure. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy, with a mix of lands that can produce red and white mana efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to win the game quickly through aggressive creature combat and burn spells.

The main concept of this Aggro - Affinity deck is to quickly deploy artifacts onto the battlefield, utilizing cards such as Kappa Cannoneer, Pinnacle Emissary, Memnite, and Claws of Gix. The deck also includes key cards like Mox Opal, Engineered Explosives, Tormod's Crypt, and Mishra's Bauble to further enhance the artifact synergy. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of artifact creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Salvage Titan, while also disrupting opponent's strategies with cards like Sink into Stupor and Pithing Needle. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Fiery Islet also provides additional utility and card advantage.

This UR aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with low cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off, while also utilizing spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to control the board. The deck's tempo is boosted by cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration, allowing for card advantage and consistent threats. With a mix of burn spells, creature buffs, and card selection, this deck seeks to maintain aggression and pressure throughout the game, utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to efficiently close out games before opponents can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and aggressive creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It leverages cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal to generate mana and card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Metallic Rebuke and Unholy Heat allows for disruption and removal to control the game. The deck also includes Urza's Saga to tutor for key artifacts and strengthen the board presence. Overall, the strategy revolves around quickly building a strong board state and putting pressure on the opponent to win the game swiftly.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. The deck aims to control the game by countering threats, removing creatures, and drawing cards to outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of disruptive creatures like Murktide Regent and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, as well as graveyard hate like Cling to Dust, adds additional layers of disruption. The deck's win conditions come from efficiently controlling the board and then closing out the game with powerful threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares.
